name: Panthers
mascot: Stanley C. Panther, Viktor E. Ratt

injuries.comment: The Panthers said on Wednesday (Sept. 17) that Tkachuk is expected to be OUT until December, per General Manager Bill Zito.
The Panthers said on Wednesday (Sept. 17) that Nosek suffered a significant knee injury while training during the offseason and that he would be out long-term, per team's General Manager Bill Zito.
